description.from: Deals 148*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+93.4% ATK Magic DMG to a random enemy 5 times and inflicts Electrocute. Enemies afflicted with Electrocute are stunned for 2sec.
description.to: Deals 148(1+0.3Skill Level)+93.4% of Attack Power as Magic Damage 5 times to a random enemy and inflicts Shock. Enemies in Shock are stunned for 1.8 sec.

description.from: For 6sec, restores HP equal to 384*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+240% ATK every 1sec. The caster cannot perform other actions while the skill is active, but all allies take 60% reduced Magic DMG.
description.to: For 6 sec, restores HP by 384(1+0.3Skill Level)+240% of Attack Power every 1 sec. You cannot take other actions while the skill is active, but all allies' Magic Damage taken is reduced by 25%.

description.from: For 7sec, increases the ATK of all allies by 206*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Attack Speed by 42%, and Critical Rate by 150.
description.to: For 7 sec, increases all allies' Attack by 206(1+0.3Skill Level), Attack Speed by 42%, and Critical Hit Chance by 420.

description.from:
Every 15sec, deals 174*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+109.2% ATK Magic DMG to 4 enemy, inflicts Electrocute for 20sec, and stuns the target for 0.6sec on a Critical Hit.
Damage taken is reduced by 15% per enemy afflicted with Electrocute, stacking up to 3 times.

Electrocute: Deals DoT equal to 25% ATK every 1sec for 20sec.
description.to:
Deals 174(1+0.3Skill Level)+109.2% of Attack Power as Magic Damage to 4 enemies, then inflicts Shock for 20 sec. On a critical hit, stuns them for 0.6 sec.
For each enemy in Shock, damage taken by you is reduced by 15%, up to 3 stacks.
Shock: For 20 sec, deals continuous Magic Damage equal to 25% of Attack Power every 1 sec.

dark.from: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 10% for 10 sec.
dark.to: For 10 sec, the target's Magic Damage taken is increased by 30%.

dark.from: If the number of enemies is 3 or fewer, removes the target's beneficial effects.
dark.to: If the number of enemies is {1} or fewer, removes the target's beneficial effects.

dark.from: When hit, reduces the attacker's Attack Speed by 200% and their Mana by 100 per sec for 5 sec. This effect can only trigger once every 5 sec.
dark.to: When hit, reduces the attacker's Attack Speed by {2}% and their Mana by {3} per sec for {1} sec. This effect can only trigger once every {4} sec.

description.from: On Normal Attack, has a 30% chance to deal Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power to 2 random enemies and reduce their Attack by {1}% for 10 sec. If they are shocked, they are stunned for 0.5 sec.
description.to: On Normal Attack, has a {0}% chance to deal Magic Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power to 2 random enemies and reduce their Attack by {2}% for 10 sec. If they are shocked, they are stunned for 2 sec.
